title: "I Am Fearfully And Wonderfully Made" Psalm 139:13-18

notes.introduction: An exposition of Psalm 139:13-18 and Genesis 1:26-27 on the origin and value of human life, tracing three claims: that mankind is made by God, known by God, and valued by God. The wonder of human reproduction in Psalm 139 is set alongside the creation account in Genesis as complementary records of God's design for human life.

sections.heading: Genesis and Psalm 139 as Complementary Records
Made by God: Origin and Formation of Man
Known by God: His Knowledge of Individuals
Valued by God: Life, Worth, and Redemption
Life at Conception and Closing Appeal
